label: Quick Access — softer green canvas
items: The mobile Quick Access screen now sits on a soft green-tinted page background that fades into the warm Rhozly off-white as you scroll. Replaces the 'mostly white' feel with something that reads more like a calm, brand-grounded main screen.
The hero card, white tiles, and 'Open full dashboard' pill all still pop against the slightly-tinted canvas — same content layout, just better-grounded visually.

label: Behind the scenes
items: The page wash uses the existing `rhozly-primary-container` token at ~7% opacity at the top, fading into `rhozly-bg`. Strictly inside the theme palette.
